name: BTC State Change Momentum Hold v1
thesis: In BTC 4h transition regimes, edge can emerge when a weak state improves and price holds above regained structure instead of instantly fading. The signal should come from broad state-change confirmation and post-break hold, not exact breakout hero timing.
edge_mechanism: state improvement followed by momentum hold
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

long: Time-based de-risk after 3 bars if unrealized gain < 0.5 * ATR_14
short: Time-based de-risk after 3 bars if unrealized gain < 0.5 * ATR_14
